# opnsense_interface_loopback (Resource)

Manages a loopback interface on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Description.

### Optional

- `device_id` (Number) Loopback device number (auto-assigned by OPNsense).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
